      "それは場所、オブジェクト、またはキャラクターを描いた番号付きカードを持っています。",
      "それはなぞなぞまたは複数のカードの組み合わせを持っています。",
      "それは各シナリオのための特定のアクセサリーを持っています。",
      "それは必須のスマートフォンアプリケーションを持っています。",
      "それは60分から90分続くように設計されたシナリオを持っています。"

    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは協力的なゲームプレイを特徴としています。",
      "それは後で他のプレイヤーが再利用できるシナリオを特徴としています。",
      "それはシナリオを解決するための時間制限を特徴としています。",
      "それはなぞなぞの解決を特徴としています。",
      "それは想像上の世界の探求を特徴としています。"
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "それはライブ脱出ゲームの最後の数分間に経験されるアドレナリンラッシュと緊張を再現するために使用されます。",

      "それはメカニズムを操作するために使用されます。",
      "それはオーディオ手がかりを聞くために使用されます。",
      "それはプレイヤーが立ち往生した場合に手がかりを得るために使用されます。",
      "それはゲームの終わりに最終スコアを計算するために使用されます。",
      "それはソロプレイに使用されます。",
      "それは複数のプレイヤーとの協力プレイに使用されます。",
      "それは脱出ゲーム体験に使用されます。"
    ],

IsA: It is a series of cooperative board games.
It is a card game format.
HasA: It has numbered cards depicting locations, objects, or characters.
It has riddles or combinations of multiple cards.
It has specific accessories for each scenario.
It has a mandatory smartphone application.
It has scenarios designed to last from 60 minutes to 90 minutes each.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by cooperative gameplay.
It is characterized by scenarios that are reusable by other players afterward.
It is characterized by a time limit for solving scenarios.
It is characterized by the resolution of riddles.
It is characterized by the exploration of an imaginary world.
UsedFor: It is used for recreating the adrenaline rush and tension experienced during the final minutes of a live escape room.
It is used for solving a scenario proposed by the game within a time limit.
It is used for entering codes.
It is used for operating mechanisms.
It is used for listening to audio clues.
It is used for obtaining hints if players are stuck.
It is used for calculating the final score at the end of the game.
It is used for playing solo.
It is used for playing cooperatively with multiple players.
It is used for escape room experiences.
OriginatedIn: It originated in the experience of real-life escape rooms.
CreatedBy: It was created by Cyril Demaegd.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by Cyril Demaegd.
PublishedIn: It was published by Space Cowboys.
ProducedBy: It was produced by Space Cowboys.
ConsistsOf: It consists of three different scenarios per box set.
It consists of numbered cards depicting locations, objects, or characters.
It consists of riddles or combinations of multiple cards.
It consists of specific accessories for each scenario.
It consists of a mandatory smartphone application.
KnownFor: It is known for its escape room inspired gameplay.
It is known for its cooperative nature.
It is known for its scenarios that are reusable.
It is known for its use of a smartphone application.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with escape rooms.
It is associated with Cyril Demaegd.
It is associated with Space Cowboys.
It is associated with "Fox in a Box" in Paris.
WonBy: It was won by the As d'Or – Game of the Year at the International Games Festival in Cannes.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by real-life escape rooms.
It was influenced by "Fox in a Box" in Paris.
